text:
Nobody hated Mbappe before he joined Madri really? Lmao 🤣 

When he renewed with Psg in 2022, the backlash from Madrid fans was massive. It got even worse after that interview where he was perceived to have disrespected the club many fans openly said Madrid should never sign him again.

Then there was the constant back-and-forth with Florentino Pérez, which made things even more frustrating. It felt like he was playing with the club for years using their interest as leverage while never making a clear decision.

The repeated transfer saga didn’t help either. Every summer it was the same story, and by 2023, with the contract clause drama at PSG, many fans were already tired of it.

On top of that, the reports about his influence at PSG and the massive contract he signed made some Madrid fans feel like he prioritized money and control over legacy
something that doesn’t align with the club’s values.

It wasn’t just Madrid fans either. A lot of Messi and Neymar Jr. fans grew frustrated with his authoritative attitude at PSG. The constant tension, selfishness, ego and lack of chemistry between them created division within the fanbase, with many feeling he was trying to position himself above player like MESSI and Ney.

Even during the 2022 Champions League run, when Vinícius Júnior scored that iconic goal against Manchester City, commentators were already saying: “Who needs Mbappé? They’ve got Vinicius Jr.”

So no, he was massively hated before he joined us.
